name: Chocolate Heart Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. For cookies: Beat together sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add milk, almond extract, and egg. Blend well. Stir in flour, cocoa, baking powder, and baking soda and mix well. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour.
On a floured surface, roll out 1/3 of the dough at a time to 1/8 inch thickness. Keep remaining dough chilled until ready to use. Cut dough into heart-shaped pieces and place on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart. Cut a smaller, 1-inch heart from the center of half the hearts. Repeat until all dough is used. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Immediately remove from cookie sheets and cool completely.
For frosting: Mix together powdered sugar, butter, and a few drops of red food coloring until well blended. Add just enough milk to achieve spreading consistency. Spread frosting on whole heart cookies and top with the cut-out hearts.
